JOI-STRIKE.title: Strike
JOI-DEFEND.title: Defend
JOI-BLACK_HOLE_STRIKE.title: Black Hole Strike
JOI-BLACK_HOLE_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {BlackHole:diff()} [gold]Black Hole[/gold] to yourself.
JOI-COMPRESS.title: Compress
JOI-TIME_ACCELERATION.title: Time Acceleration
JOI-TIME_ACCELERATION.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
Apply {BlackHole:diff()} [gold]Black Hole[/gold] to yourself.
JOI-BIRTH.title: Birth
JOI-BIRTH.description: Whenever [gold]Black Hole[/gold] triggers, summon an [gold]Axis Core[/gold] with HP equal to [gold]Black Hole[/gold] stacks. If one exists, increase its HP by {Amount:diff()}.
JOI-OMNISCIENT.title: Omniscient
JOI-OMNISCIENT.description: Whenever you gain [gold]Black Hole[/gold], also gain {WhiteHole:diff()} [gold]White Hole[/gold].
JOI-HEAVY_HAMMER.title: Heavy Hammer
JOI-HEAVY_HAMMER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
Apply {BlackHole:diff()} [gold]Black Hole[/gold] to yourself.
JOI-COSMIC_EXPLOSION.title: Cosmic Explosion
JOI-COSMIC_EXPLOSION.description: Deal damage equal to your [gold]Black Hole[/gold] stacks to ALL enemies X{IfUpgraded:show:+1|} times, then clear [gold]Black Hole[/gold].
JOI-TWO_POLE_REVERSAL.title: Two-Pole Reversal
JOI-TWO_POLE_REVERSAL.description: Apply {BlackHole:diff()} [gold]Black Hole[/gold] and {WhiteHole:diff()} [gold]White Hole[/gold] to yourself, then swap their stacks.
JOI-GRAVITATIONAL_WAVE.title: Gravitational Wave
JOI-GRAVITATIONAL_WAVE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the target has a debuff, apply {BlackHole:diff()} [gold]Black Hole[/gold] to yourself.
JOI-SPACETIME_DISTORTION.title: Spacetime Distortion
JOI-SPACETIME_DISTORTION.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
Apply {BlackHole:diff()} [gold]Black Hole[/gold] to yourself.
JOI-SINGULARITY.title: Singularity
JOI-PHOTON_JET.title: Photon Jet
JOI-PHOTON_JET.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
Apply {WhiteHole:diff()} [gold]White Hole[/gold] to yourself.
JOI-BINARY_STAR_COLLISION.title: Binary Star Collision
JOI-BINARY_STAR_COLLISION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {BlackHole:diff()} [gold]Black Hole[/gold] and {WhiteHole:diff()} [gold]White Hole[/gold] to yourself.
JOI-HAWKING_RADIATION.title: Hawking Radiation
JOI-HAWKING_RADIATION.description: Remove up to 5 [gold]Black Hole[/gold]. Gain {BlockPerStack:diff()} Block for each removed.
JOI-QUANTUM_ENTANGLEMENT.title: Quantum Entanglement
JOI-QUANTUM_ENTANGLEMENT.description: Transfer half of your [gold]Black Hole[/gold] stacks to [gold]White Hole[/gold] (rounded down).
JOI-DARK_MATTER_IMPACT.title: Dark Matter Impact
JOI-DARK_MATTER_IMPACT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have 5+ [gold]Black Hole[/gold], deal additional damage equal to your [gold]Black Hole[/gold] stacks.
JOI-EVENT_HORIZON.title: Event Horizon
JOI-EVENT_HORIZON.description: Whenever you gain [gold]Black Hole[/gold], gain {Block:diff()} Block.
JOI-SUPERNOVA.title: Supernova
JOI-SUPERNOVA.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Clear all [gold]Black Hole[/gold] and [gold]White Hole[/gold]. Deal 2 additional damage for each stack cleared.
JOI-TIME_DILATION.title: Time Dilation
JOI-TIME_DILATION.description:
For each card played this turn, apply {BlackHole:diff()} [gold]Black Hole[/gold] to yourself.
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
JOI-GRAVITATIONAL_LENS.title: Gravitational Lens
JOI-GRAVITATIONAL_LENS.description: Whenever you gain [gold]White Hole[/gold], deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
JOI-GRAVITY_FIELD.title: Gravity Field
JOI-GRAVITY_FIELD.description: Whenever you gain [gold]White Hole[/gold], deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
JOI-COSMIC_RIP.title: Cosmic Rip
JOI-COSMIC_RIP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Apply {BlackHole:diff()} [gold]Black Hole[/gold] to yourself.
JOI-TIME_REWIND.title: Time Rewind
JOI-TIME_REWIND.description: Add {Retrieve:diff()} card(s) from your discard pile to your hand.
JOI-TIME_REWIND.selectionPrompt: Choose a card from your discard pile.
JOI-DIMENSION_JUMP.title: Dimension Jump
JOI-LIGHT_SPEED_ESCAPE.title: Light Speed Escape
JOI-PULSE_RAY.title: Pulse Ray
JOI-PULSE_RAY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
Apply {WhiteHole:diff()} [gold]White Hole[/gold] to yourself.
JOI-TELEPORT.title: Teleport
JOI-DARK_ENERGY_ARROW.title: Dark Energy Arrow
JOI-DARK_ENERGY_ARROW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If this kills the target, refund the energy cost.
JOI-QUANTUM_SUPERPOSITION.title: Quantum Superposition
JOI-QUANTUM_SUPERPOSITION.description: Copy {Cards:diff()} card(s) in your hand with cost ≤1.
JOI-AXIAL_IMPACT.title: Axial Impact
JOI-HEAD_CIRCUMFERENCE_MEASUREMENT.title: Head Circumference Measurement
JOI-HEAD_CIRCUMFERENCE_MEASUREMENT.descr:
Draw cards until you have {TargetHandSize:diff()} cards in hand.
Apply X [gold]Black Hole[/gold] to yourself, where X is the number of cards drawn.
JOI-SLEEPY_RADIO.title: Sleepy Radio
JOI-SNEEZE.title: Sneeze
JOI-SNEEZE.description:
Exhaust 1 card from your hand.
Apply {WhiteHole:diff()} [gold]White Hole[/gold] to yourself.
JOI-SNEEZE.selectionPrompt: Choose a card from your hand to exhaust.
JOI-VACUUM_FLUCTUATION.title: Vacuum Fluctuation
JOI-VACUUM_FLUCTUATION.description: Each turn, the first {Amount:diff()} time(s) you gain [gold]Black Hole[/gold] or [gold]White Hole[/gold], gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
JOI-MUA.title: MUA
JOI-MUA.description: Summon a 5 HP [gold]Axis Core[/gold]. If you already have one, it heals {Heal:diff()} HP instead.
JOI-WHITE_HOLE_JET.title: White Hole Jet
JOI-WHITE_HOLE_JET.description: Lose {WhiteHole:diff()} [gold]White Hole[/gold], draw {Cards:diff()} card(s), and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. If you do not have enough [gold]White Hole[/gold], nothing happens.
JOI-WHITE_HOLE_REFLUX.title: White Hole Reflux
JOI-WHITE_HOLE_REFLUX.description: Remove all [gold]White Hole[/gold]. Heal HP equal to the removed stacks, then apply {WhiteHole:diff()} [gold]White Hole[/gold] to yourself.
JOI-PURE_WHITE_FORM.title: Pure White Form
JOI-PURE_WHITE_FORM.description: Convert all [gold]Black Hole[/gold] into the same amount of [gold]White Hole[/gold].
JOI-IDOL_CHARM.title: Idol Charm
JOI-ORIGINAL_CHICKEN.title: Original Chicken
JOI-QUESTION_BOX.title: Question Box
JOI-QUESTION_BOX.description:
Choose {Cards:diff()} card(s) in your hand.
Their cost becomes 0.
JOI-QUESTION_BOX.selectionPrompt: Choose card(s) to set to 0 cost.
JOI-COLLECT_RICE.title: Collect Rice
JOI-NEBUL_LULLABY.title: Nebula Lullaby
JOI-NEBUL_LULLABY.description:
Apply {SleepPower:diff()} [gold]Sleep[/gold] to an enemy.
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
JOI-NIGHTMARE_EROSION.title: Nightmare Erosion
JOI-NIGHTMARE_EROSION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the target is [gold]Sleeping[/gold], apply {BlackHole:diff()} [gold]Black Hole[/gold] to yourself.
JOI-DEEP_SPACE_LULLABY.title: Deep Space Lullaby
JOI-DEEP_SPACE_LULLABY.description:
Apply {SleepPower:diff()} [gold]Sleep[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Draw 1 card for each enemy with [gold]Sleep[/gold].
JOI-GRAVITY_TETHER.title: Gravity Tether
JOI-GRAVITY_TETHER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If any enemy has [gold]Charm[/gold], deal {BonusDamage:diff()} additional damage.
JOI-CONFUSION_RAY.title: Confusion Ray
JOI-CONFUSION_RAY.description:
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to an enemy.
If the target has [gold]Charm[/gold], apply to ALL enemies instead.
JOI-RESONANCE_BOND.title: Resonance Bond
JOI-RESONANCE_BOND.description:
Apply [gold]Charm[/gold] to an enemy.
Apply {WhiteHole:diff()} [gold]White Hole[/gold] and {BlackHole:diff()} [gold]Black Hole[/gold] to yourself.
